item.title: robtFPL: Rob T @robtFPL · 4min Although Senesi's season numbers look better on the surface, Hill has generally had the DEFCON edg
item.description:
Rob T @robtFPL · 4min Although Senesi's season numbers look better on the surface, Hill has generally had the DEFCON edge since the two of them paired up in GW19 (79% v 64% hit rate) Cita Harry @FPL_Harry · 1h If you could only pick 1… Who do you chose?
Hill (£4.2m) vs Senesi (£5.2m)
xGi per 90… Hill: 0.10 Senesi: 0.20
G/A per 90 Hill: 0.10 Senesi: 0.10
DEFCON per 90 Hill: 11.14 Senesi: 11.93 1 13 969

item.description:
Manchester City @ManCity · 9min Refer a friend, get extra tickets!
Enter our April Prize Draw from just £5 for your chance to win a team photo experience at our final home game against Aston Villa, plus match tickets!
Subscribe to the @citcmancity Prize Draw and earn bonus tickets when you refer a Mostrar más 16 11 93 5 mil

item.title: Plettigoal: Florian Plettenberg @Plettigoal · 12min Exclusive news, now official. Ozan Kabak has signed a new contract until 2030 w
item.description:
Florian Plettenberg @Plettigoal · 12min Exclusive news, now official. Ozan Kabak has signed a new contract until 2030 with a release clause of €25 million in summer 2027. Cita Florian Plettenberg @Plettigoal · 31 mar. TSG Hoffenheim are pushing to extend Ozan #Kabak’s contract, which expires at the end of the season.
New talks are planned for the coming days, with Hoffenheim optimistic about reaching an agreement in the next weeks. A new long-term deal is on the table, very likely to 7 3 101 15 mil
